name: RPlog_Face_to_Face
title: Crossed Paths at Bog's
summary: In the smuggler's port of Esau's Ridge on the overlooked world of Tholatin, the spacer Raxis waits at the seedy sports-betting tavern Bog's for his comrades Rebecca and Gene to join him for a few days off. Unbeknownst to them, the Corellian operative Krieg and his agent Keline are conducting covert intelligence business in a nearby booth, trading datapads in coded Corellian with a shady contact. As the two groups settle in, Gene quietly spots Krieg's table and his mood darkens, while Raxis, passing the departing contact, also takes note of the booth before slipping into the refresher. There Raxis comms Rebecca to go to earpiece, the casual evening tipping into mutual surveillance as both parties realize they may not be the only ones with an interest in Bog's. The scene breaks off mid-conversation, continued in a second part.
